No matter natural or synthetic piperidine derivatives exhibit an extensive range of biological activities such as anti-tumor, anti-inflammatory, anxiolytics, anti-epileptics.
The compounds have the connecting ring structures of piperazine or piperidine, have notable antitumor activity, and provide a new choice for preparing antitumor drugs in clinical practice.
